name: Dino Game Unblocked
description: Run for your life in Dino Run: Jurassic Survival! Dash through dynamic prehistoric landscapes, from lush jungles to volcanic wastelands, escaping extinction in this addictive endless runner. Features: Endless Action: Test your reflexes as speed increases. Dynamic World: Survive day-night cycles, weather changes, and falling asteroids. Immersive Audio: Experience 10 unique musical themes and realistic dinosaur roars. Play Anywhere: Optimized for Desktop & Mobile. No downloads required! Can you beat the high score? Challenge yourself in the ultimate Dino game available online!
instructions: Desktop Press Spacebar Up Arrow or Click to Jump Mobile Tap screen to Jump
